thresholdSource: criticalHigh 15: Beaumont Laboratory Critical (Panic) Values list, Uric Acid >15 mg/dL, called as RED alert inpatient and outpatient (BL.OP.RG.006.r04, effective 03/04/2024 — institutional tier). plausibleHigh 75: above the documented survived extreme of 71.3 mg/dL in a tumor-lysis-syndrome patient with anuric acute renal failure, treated with sequential hemodialysis and discharged after recovery — reported as the highest known uric acid level at publication (Renal Failure, 2010; PMID 20662707). No criticalLow/plausibleLow — hypouricemia has no recognized lab panic value. Draft — not clinician-approved.
